retry_reason: If dev_pm_opp_find_freq_exact fails (e.g., frequency not in OPP table), the condition is permanent for that frequency; retrying will not succeed because the OPP table does not change.

judge.reason: The primary purpose is to set the initial GMU frequency, not to manage OPP references. The OPP get/put are incidental steps to safely acquire and release the OPP object while performing the frequency configuration. No reference-counted object is transferred to the caller.
judge.retry_reason: If dev_pm_opp_find_freq_exact fails (e.g., frequency not in OPP table), the condition is permanent for that frequency; retrying will not succeed because the OPP table does not change.

final.retry_reason: If dev_pm_opp_find_freq_exact fails (e.g., frequency not in OPP table), the condition is permanent for that frequency; retrying will not succeed because the OPP table does not change.
